title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: School Swimming Lessons
questions.text: Students having swimming lessons this term should bring a towel and a plastic bag for wet clothes. Goggles are useful but not required. The school will provide swimming caps for everyone.
questions.question: What do students need to bring?

options.B: Something for carrying wet clothes afterwards.
options.A: A swimming cap for every lesson.
options.C: Goggles before they can enter the pool.

questions.explanation: Students should bring a plastic bag for wet clothes.

questions.heading: Message from Finn to Lara
questions.text: Lara, I’ve checked the cinema times and the earlier film is almost full. There are plenty of seats for the later one, though. Shall we go then and have something to eat first?
questions.question: What is Finn suggesting?

options.C: Choosing a later film and eating before it.
options.A: Buying tickets for the earlier film immediately.
options.B: Eating after both films have finished.

questions.explanation: Finn suggests the later film and eating before it.

questions.heading: Saturday Football Skills
questions.text: Improve your football skills with coaches from the local club. Sessions are for girls and boys aged 12 to 15. Bring boots if you have them, but trainers are fine for the first week.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.A: New players do not need special shoes immediately.
options.B: Only students with football boots can join.
options.C: The sessions are for adults and teenagers.

questions.explanation: Trainers are acceptable for the first week.

questions.heading: From: Mum / Subject: Your jacket
questions.text: Your blue jacket was still wet this morning, so I’ve put your black one by the front door. It’s colder than yesterday, and you’ll need something warm after football practice.
questions.question: Why has Mum sent this message?

options.B: To tell the reader which jacket to wear.
options.A: To ask where the blue jacket is.
options.C: To say football practice has been cancelled.

questions.explanation: Mum has put out the black jacket because the blue one is wet.

questions.heading: School Debate Club
questions.text: Debate club meets on Thursdays after school. This week, members will choose topics for the competition. If you cannot attend, send your idea to Mrs Hall before Thursday lunchtime.
questions.question: What should absent members do?

options.C: Send their topic suggestion before the meeting.
options.A: Ask Mrs Hall to cancel the competition.
options.B: Choose all competition topics next week.

questions.explanation: Members who cannot attend should send their idea before Thursday lunchtime.
